steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is despite his popular reputation—a contrast marker announcing the sentence will refute or complicate an expectation.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The correct answer states the function exactly: to refute “the possible impression that García Márquez conformed to magical realism in all of his works.” The other three either identify comparisons not made in the passage, suggest relationships unsupported by the text, or add value judgments the sentence never implies.

That is the correct answer.
